ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-01-1992 is admitted to probate. Jennifer Lee Baer-Riedhart is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawtiz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-22-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
